def positive_string_startswith_endswith_chain():
    rule_id = "string_startswith_endswith_chain"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Repeated startswith(...) or endswith(...) checks that can often be combined into tuple-based calls."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
